data.name: 與狐妖的同居生活
data.detailed_description:
◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

◆故事：

判斷錯誤，暴風雪剝奪了我所有生的希望。
即將倒下的時候，我碰到了一個和我一樣處境的狐妖……

最後，我藉著她的妖力 帶著她算是平穩的回到了自己的住處……

不過看來以後的生活要在一起了。
但是，接觸妖…一定會發生平常人類接觸不到的事情……

◆玩法

遊戲為模擬養成類遊戲
主要與狐妖“微'在一起度過30天的生活

一天可以與狐妖“微'進行四次的行動
行動指令有【對話】【互動】【外出】和【H】等各種行動

帶她去各種獨特的場所遊玩 , 增加彼此的好感度
與她對話了解她的過去, 與知曉關於“微"的更多秘密.....

此外隨著天數的進行可以解鎖更多與狐妖“微"特殊的劇情事件。
遊戲內還有許多不同的H事件 ，可以和微進行各種體位的H

但畢竟是和妖生活，所以見到其他妖也不算是稀奇的事情了……

◆遊戲特色

◇27張基本CG，包含差分300張以上

◇戀愛養成遊戲
◇遊戲結局：四種

data.short_description: 你在登雪山時碰到了暴風雪, 在雪地裡救了一隻受傷的狐妖，並帶她回到了家裡,展開甜蜜的同居生活.....
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文, 英文, 日文*, 繁體中文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 泰文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Living together with Fox Demon
data.detailed_description:
◆Featured Systems

◇Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment setting, and HCG can be freely browsed.
◇Pressure-Free Operation Support one-click mouse operation-Fast text-to-text system

◆ Story

The storm deprived me of all hope of life.
As I was about to collapse, I met a fox demon who was in the same situation as me…

In the end, I used her demonic powers to bring her back to my place smoothly...

It seemed like we were going to be together for the rest of our lives.
However, having demons around would certainly lead to things that mere humans couldn’t imagine...

◆ Gameplay instructions

The game is a simulation game mainly with the fox demon Vivi. You will spend 30 days together.

Four actions can be carried out with the fox demon Vivi in a day.
Action commands include "Talk", "Interact", "Go out" and "H".

Take her to various unique places to play and increase the positive feelings toward each other.
Talk with her to understand her past and uncover her secrets…

As the days pass by, you can unlock more special plot events with Vivi.
There are also many different Hentai events in the game. You can do various positions with Vivi.

But remember, living with a demon means you might see other demons along the way...

◆ Game Features

◇27 basic CG, including more than 300 differences

◇Love cultivation game
◇Game ending: four kinds

data.short_description: You encountered a snowstorm while climbing a snowy mountain. You saved an injured fox demon in the snow and brought her back home to start a sweet life together...
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Thai, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
